content:
$4000–$27000 in daily profit, no one talked about it

Reversed-engineered this and told open claw to build something similar

A single prompt, and 30 minutes later

-> pulls btc data from TradingView
-> Captures arbitrage windows when Polymarket lags the reference price by over
0.3%
-> Fires in under 100ms, capitalizing on inefficiencies before the market self-
corrects
-> Processes over 1,000 orders per second, capturing 0.3–0.8% on each trade

Risk-controlled at 0.5% per trade with a hard 2% daily drawdown limit

Generates $4000–$27000 in daily profit consistently

https://polymarket.com/@0x1d0034134e

Runs entirely on local hardware

And built in Rust for low latency
